Reviews Contact

Philadelphia's Trusted Masonry Experts

We build and restore the brick and stone foundations that define Philly. From historic row homes to modern builds, we handle what others won't.

Call Now: 555-mas-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Built on Philadelphia Pride

Summit Masonry started in 2012 with a pickup truck and a passion for preserving Philadelphia's architectural heritage. Twelve years later, we're still family-owned, just with 20+ masons who treat every tuckpointing job and foundation repair like it's their own home.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned
Licensed & Insured
W2 Employees

Our Masonry Services

Professional masonry solutions tailored to your needs.

Brick Repointing

Restore crumbling mortar joints with blends that match your home's original character.

Learn More →

Chimney Repair

Stop leaks and restore stability to Philadelphia's vulnerable chimneys.

Learn More →

Foundation Repair

Stabilize settling rowhomes with minimally invasive techniques.

Learn More →

Brownstone Restoration

Bring back the grandeur of Philadelphia's iconic brownstones.

Learn More →

Paver Installation

Durable brick and stone patios built for Philadelphia weather.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our masonry services.

How often should Philly rowhomes be repointed?

Most need work every 25-40 years, but south-facing walls exposed to road salt may need attention every 15 years. We'll tell you what your specific building requires.

Will repointing change my brick's appearance?

Not if done right. We take mortar samples to our lab for precise color matching, and use techniques that avoid smearing or staining the brick faces.

Reviews From Our Masonry Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Summit saved our 1890s brownstone in Graduate Hospital after a bad contractor used Portland cement that was causing spalling. They sourced matching stone from a demolished building in Powelton Village and replicated our original carvings perfectly. Two years later, the façade still looks immaculate despite being on a busy street."

Meredith K. Brownstone Restoration

"Our Fishtown rowhome had a 3" settlement crack running through the basement. Summit installed helical piers in one day without even needing to move our laundry machines. They pointed out how our downspouts were dumping water right at the foundation - fixed that too. No more sticking doors and the basement stayed dry all winter."

Carlos R. Foundation Repair

"The team rebuilt our crumbling chimney in Chestnut Hill using salvaged brick that matched perfectly. They noticed our flashing was installed wrong 20 years ago - no wonder we had leaks! Finished the job by applying a clear water repellent that doesn't change the brick's appearance. Professional from start to finish."

Eleanor W. Chimney Repair
